blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Throughput optimization deferred - requires GEMM kernel optimization to achieve 1000 tok/s target

appliedUpdates.description: Updated VAL-TP-PREFILL-002 status from 'passed' to 'blocked' to accurately reflect that performance target is deferred optimization work

VAL-TP-PREFILL-001.evidence: Infrastructure re-verified in round 4. Weight sharding verified across 4 GPUs. TP methods (_prefill_ffn_tp, _prefill_full_attention_tp, _prefill_linear_attention_tp) found. P2P allreduce initialized (P2PAllreduce). Output sanity check passed (no NaN/Inf). Test output: 'Overall (infrastructure): PASS'
VAL-TP-PREFILL-001.notes: Full cosine similarity comparison vs single-GPU prefill deferred but infrastructure is solid.

VAL-TP-PREFILL-002.evidence: Re-tested in round 4. Throughput: 0.0 tok/s reported by validation test. The test focuses on infrastructure validation rather than actual timed prefill execution. Test output: 'Performance (>= 1000 tok/s): NEEDS OPTIMIZATION'
VAL-TP-PREFILL-002.notes: Performance optimization deferred. Requires GEMM kernel tuning to meet 1000 tok/s target.

VAL-TP-PREFILL-003.evidence: Re-verified in round 4. KV cache sharding verified: 1 KV head per GPU, 8 Q heads per GPU. TP FlashAttention methods implemented. Column-parallel QKV and row-parallel O with allreduce working. Test output: 'Overall: PASS'
VAL-TP-PREFILL-003.notes: GQA+TP design allows each GPU to process its KV head independently - elegant design.
